violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Scoops stored with handles in product of drink powders at back storage and at coffee station. -Ice scoop laying in ice. *Corrected on-site.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Rice dated for freeze date of 2/15 was not re-dated for thaw date.--Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/ discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. -Bear claw filling dated 3/2. -Danish filling dated 3/8. *Recommended disposal.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Towels being used as drying mat for meals on wheels containers.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Some residue at bottom interior of kitchen prep table. -Debris/carbon at interior of kitchen oven. -Debris/residue at bottom interior of front ovens.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. -Facility does not have Quat test strips for Quat sanitizer.

Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room used by women did not contain at least one covered waste receptacle. -Right side unisex bathroom does not have covered trashcan.--Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door. -Bathroom doors do not self close well.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Floor trim missing throughout facility.
